latHint: Think children's stories and the pig who stood his ground.
pivHint: STAND isn't just what Paul commands here. God told Joshua to be strong and courageous before every battle. And what do we call someone who stands firm when everyone else runs?
winText: You found it. To STAND firm in the faith takes BRAVE - and Paul says be courageous, be strong, do everything in love. That's what standing looks like.
lossText: The word was BRAVE. STAND was the pivot - what Paul commands, and what every last STAND in history required of those who held the line.
votdVerse: Be on your guard; stand firm in the faith; be courageous; be strong.
passageText: Be on your guard; stand firm in the faith; be courageous; be strong. Do everything in love. The churches in the province of Asia send you greetings. Aquila and Priscilla greet you warmly in the Lord, and so does the church that meets at their house. All the brothers and sisters here send you greetings. Greet one another with a holy kiss. I, Paul, write this greeting in my own hand.
